subject: fix(strengthen): address 10 review findings across components and services
body:
Fixes and improvements from post-review analysis:

1. NodeDetail: stable IDs for property edit rows (was array index keys)
2. NodeDetail + CreateNodeModal: prevent duplicate label suggestions
3. ArcDetail: add labels and properties editor (feature parity with NodeDetail)
4. propertyUtils: guard long digit strings (>15 digits) from number coercion
5. embeddingWorkerBridge: privatize batch state behind getBatchState()
6. SmartMatchingStep: cap retry attempts at 3 to prevent infinite loops
7. useSelection: pick last remaining item (most recently selected) on deselect
8. queryEngine: document MAX_EXPANSION_HOPS constant
9. mergeService: clarify two-layer title-to-ID map comment
10. TimelineView: document effectiveSelected invariant

Tags: review, strengthen, bug-fix, feature-gap, code-quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-followup
Semver: minor
